homepage.aboutTitle: Built on Quality, Rooted in San Francisco
aboutText: San Francisco Roofing Service started with a simple goal: to provide exceptional siding services to our neighbors throughout the Bay Area. We're a family-owned and operated business, and we believe in treating every home as if it were our own.

Our approach is straightforward: honest assessments, quality materials, and skilled craftsmanship. We prioritize clear communication and meticulous attention to detail, ensuring a smooth and stress-free experience from start to finish.

We're proud to be part of the San Francisco community, and we're committed to giving back. We actively support local initiatives and strive to minimize our environmental impact through responsible waste management and sustainable practices.

services.name: Vinyl Siding Installation
services.shortDescription: Durable, affordable, and versatile siding solutions for San Francisco homes.
services.description: Vinyl siding remains a popular choice for San Francisco homeowners seeking a balance of affordability, durability, and low maintenance. It's resistant to moisture, pests, and fading, making it an excellent option for our often damp and foggy climate. We offer a wide variety of colors and styles to complement any architectural design, from classic Victorian homes to modern condos. Our experienced installers ensure a precise and weather-tight fit, protecting your home from the elements for years to come. We handle everything from removing old siding to installing new trim and flashing, leaving you with a beautifully renovated home exterior. We carefully inspect your home's existing structure to ensure proper support and ventilation, preventing moisture buildup and prolonging the life of your new siding. We also offer a range of insulation options to improve energy efficiency and reduce your heating and cooling costs.
process: Step 1: Consultation & Estimate - We assess your needs and provide a detailed, transparent quote.
Step 2: Material Selection - Choose from our extensive range of vinyl siding colors and styles.
Step 3: Removal & Preparation - We safely remove your old siding and prepare the surface for installation.
Step 4: Installation & Inspection - Our skilled team installs your new siding with precision and care.
benefits: Low maintenance and easy to clean
Resistant to moisture, pests, and fading
Wide variety of colors and styles

faq.question: How long does vinyl siding last in San Francisco's climate?
faq.answer: With proper installation and maintenance, vinyl siding can last for 30-40 years in the San Francisco climate. Regular cleaning will help prevent mold and mildew growth.

faq.question: What are the benefits of insulated vinyl siding?
faq.answer: Insulated vinyl siding provides added energy efficiency, reducing heating and cooling costs. It also helps to dampen outside noise and improve the overall comfort of your home.

faq.question: Is vinyl siding environmentally friendly?
faq.answer: Modern vinyl siding is recyclable, and many manufacturers use recycled materials in their products. It's also a durable and long-lasting option, reducing the need for frequent replacements.

services.name: Fiber Cement Siding Installation
services.shortDescription: Durable, fire-resistant, and beautiful siding for San Francisco's diverse architecture.
services.description: Fiber cement siding is an increasingly popular choice for San Francisco homeowners who want a durable, low-maintenance, and aesthetically pleasing siding option. Made from a combination of cement, sand, and cellulose fibers, it offers exceptional resistance to fire, pests, and moisture. Fiber cement siding is also incredibly versatile, mimicking the look of wood, stucco, or brick. This makes it an ideal choice for preserving the architectural integrity of older homes in neighborhoods like Pacific Heights and the Marina. Our expert installers are trained to handle the unique challenges of fiber cement siding, ensuring a precise and long-lasting installation. We pay close attention to detail, properly sealing all seams and joints to prevent water damage. We also offer a wide range of colors and textures to match your home's existing style. Fiber cement siding is also a great choice for new construction projects, adding value and curb appeal to your property.
process: Step 1: Consultation & Design - We help you choose the right fiber cement siding for your home.
Step 2: Precise Measurements - Accurate measurements ensure a perfect fit and minimal waste.
Step 3: Professional Installation - Our certified installers follow strict manufacturer guidelines.
Step 4: Quality Assurance - We inspect the finished product to ensure your complete satisfaction.
benefits: Low maintenance and easy to clean

faq.question: How does fiber cement siding hold up in San Francisco's weather?
faq.answer: Fiber cement siding is highly resistant to moisture, rot, and pests, making it an excellent choice for San Francisco's often damp climate. It won't warp or crack like wood siding can.

faq.question: Can fiber cement siding be painted?
faq.answer: Yes, fiber cement siding can be painted to match your home's color scheme. It holds paint exceptionally well, providing a long-lasting and beautiful finish.

faq.question: What is the average lifespan of fiber cement siding?
faq.answer: With proper installation and maintenance, fiber cement siding can last for 50 years or more, making it a worthwhile investment for your home.

services.name: Wood Siding Installation
services.shortDescription: Classic beauty and natural charm for San Francisco's historic homes.
services.description: Wood siding offers a timeless aesthetic that complements San Francisco's many Victorian and Edwardian homes. We specialize in installing and repairing various types of wood siding, including clapboard, shingle, and board-and-batten. We understand the importance of preserving the original character of these historic homes, and we use only the highest-quality wood materials to ensure a seamless and authentic restoration. Our skilled craftsmen have years of experience working with wood siding, and they take pride in their attention to detail. We carefully prepare the surface before installation, ensuring proper drainage and ventilation to prevent moisture damage. We also offer a range of staining and painting options to protect your wood siding from the elements and enhance its natural beauty. Proper maintenance is crucial for wood siding, which is why we provide expert advice and maintenance services to keep your siding looking its best for years to come.
process: Step 1: Assessment and Consultation - We evaluate your existing wood siding and discuss your options.
Step 2: Material Selection - Choose from a variety of wood species and styles.
Step 3: Precise Installation - Our experienced craftsmen install your new wood siding with precision.
Step 4: Finishing and Protection - We stain or paint your siding to protect it from the elements.

faq.question: What are the benefits of using redwood siding in San Francisco?
faq.answer: Redwood is naturally resistant to insects and decay, making it a durable and long-lasting choice for San Francisco's climate. It also has a beautiful natural color and grain pattern.

faq.question: How often should wood siding be painted or stained?
faq.answer: Wood siding should be painted or stained every 5-7 years, depending on the climate and the type of finish used. Regular maintenance will help prevent moisture damage and extend the life of your siding.

faq.question: What are the signs that my wood siding needs repair?
faq.answer: Signs of damage include rot, warping, cracking, and insect infestations. It's important to address these issues promptly to prevent further damage to your home.

services.name: Stucco Siding Services
services.shortDescription: Traditional stucco application and repair for San Francisco homes.
services.description: Stucco is a popular siding choice in San Francisco, known for its durability and ability to withstand the elements. We offer comprehensive stucco siding services, including new installations, repairs, and refinishing. Our team of experienced stucco specialists is skilled in applying traditional and synthetic stucco systems, ensuring a smooth and long-lasting finish. We understand the importance of proper preparation and application techniques to prevent cracking and water damage. We use only the highest-quality materials and follow industry best practices to ensure a durable and weather-resistant stucco siding. Whether you're looking to install new stucco siding or repair existing damage, we have the expertise to get the job done right. Stucco siding is a cost-effective and energy-efficient option that can enhance the curb appeal and value of your home. We can also add decorative elements to your stucco siding, such as arches, moldings, and textures, to create a unique and personalized look.
process: Step 1: Consultation and Assessment - We evaluate your existing stucco and discuss your needs.
Step 2: Preparation and Application - We prepare the surface and apply the stucco in multiple layers.
Step 3: Texturing and Finishing - We create the desired texture and finish for your stucco siding.
Step 4: Sealing and Protection - We seal the stucco to protect it from the elements.

faq.question: What are the advantages of stucco siding in San Francisco's climate?
faq.answer: Stucco is highly resistant to moisture, fire, and pests, making it an excellent choice for San Francisco's climate. It also provides good insulation, helping to regulate indoor temperatures.

faq.question: How often should stucco siding be inspected?
faq.answer: Stucco siding should be inspected annually for cracks, chips, and other signs of damage. Prompt repairs can prevent further damage and extend the life of your siding.

faq.question: Can stucco siding be painted?
faq.answer: Yes, stucco siding can be painted with a breathable elastomeric paint. This will help protect the stucco from moisture and prevent cracking.

services.name: Siding Repair Services
services.shortDescription: Expert siding repair to protect your San Francisco home from the elements.
services.description: Damaged siding can compromise the structural integrity of your home and leave it vulnerable to water damage, pests, and energy loss. We offer comprehensive siding repair services to address any issues, from minor cracks and holes to extensive rot and decay. Our experienced technicians are skilled in repairing all types of siding, including vinyl, fiber cement, wood, and stucco. We use only the highest-quality materials and techniques to ensure a lasting and seamless repair. We understand the importance of addressing siding issues promptly to prevent further damage and protect your investment. Whether you have storm damage, insect infestations, or simply wear and tear, we can restore your siding to its original condition. We also offer preventative maintenance services to help extend the life of your siding and avoid costly repairs in the future. Our goal is to provide you with peace of mind knowing that your home is protected by durable and well-maintained siding.
process: Step 1: Inspection and Assessment - We identify the extent of the damage and provide a detailed estimate.
Step 2: Material Matching - We match the existing siding to ensure a seamless repair.
Step 3: Expert Repair - Our skilled technicians repair the damaged siding with precision.
Step 4: Quality Assurance - We inspect the finished repair to ensure your complete satisfaction.
benefits: Protects your home from the elements
Prevents water damage and pest infestations

faq.question: What are the common causes of siding damage in San Francisco?
faq.answer: Common causes of siding damage in San Francisco include moisture, wind, storms, and insect infestations. Older homes may also experience siding damage due to settling and age.

faq.question: How do I know if my siding needs repair?
faq.answer: Signs that your siding needs repair include cracks, holes, rot, warping, and peeling paint. You may also notice increased energy bills or water stains on your interior walls.

faq.question: Is it better to repair or replace my siding?
faq.answer: The decision to repair or replace your siding depends on the extent of the damage and the age of your siding. If the damage is minor and localized, repair may be the best option. However, if the damage is extensive or your siding is old and deteriorating, replacement may be necessary.

services.name: Siding Replacement Services
services.shortDescription: Upgrade your San Francisco home with new, durable, and beautiful siding.
services.description: When siding is beyond repair, replacement is the best option to protect your home and enhance its curb appeal. We offer comprehensive siding replacement services, providing you with a wide range of options to choose from. Our experienced team will guide you through the selection process, helping you choose the right siding material, color, and style to complement your home's architecture and your personal preferences. We handle every aspect of the replacement process, from removing the old siding to installing the new siding with precision and care. We use only the highest-quality materials and follow industry best practices to ensure a durable and long-lasting result. Replacing your siding can not only improve the look of your home but also increase its energy efficiency and value. We are committed to providing you with a seamless and stress-free siding replacement experience. We also offer financing options to make siding replacement more affordable.
process: Step 1: Consultation and Planning - We discuss your needs and help you choose the right siding.
Step 2: Removal and Disposal - We safely remove and dispose of your old siding.
Step 3: Installation - Our skilled team installs your new siding with precision and care.
Step 4: Final Inspection - We conduct a final inspection to ensure your complete satisfaction.
benefits: Enhances curb appeal and home value
Protects your home from the elements

faq.question: What are the benefits of replacing my old siding?
faq.answer: Replacing old siding can improve your home's curb appeal, increase its value, improve energy efficiency, and protect it from the elements.

faq.question: How long does siding replacement take?
faq.answer: The duration of a siding replacement project depends on the size and complexity of your home. Most projects can be completed in 1-2 weeks.

faq.question: What is the cost of siding replacement?
faq.answer: The cost of siding replacement varies depending on the material, size of your home, and complexity of the project. We offer free estimates to provide you with a clear understanding of the costs involved.

reviews.name: Maria S.
reviews.text: San Francisco Roofing Service did an amazing job installing vinyl siding on my home in the Sunset District! The crew was professional, efficient, and the price was very reasonable. My house looks brand new.

reviews.name: David K.
reviews.text: I hired San Francisco Roofing Service to replace my old wood siding with fiber cement siding. The quality of the work was excellent, and the crew was respectful of my property. There were a few minor delays due to weather, but they kept me informed throughout the process.

reviews.name: Jennifer L.
reviews.text: My stucco siding had some cracks and damage from the recent earthquake. San Francisco Roofing Service came out quickly and repaired the damage expertly. You can't even tell there was ever a problem!

reviews.name: Robert P.
reviews.text: We wanted to maintain the historic look of our Victorian home in Alamo Square. San Francisco Roofing Service did a fantastic job installing new wood siding that perfectly matches the original. Highly recommend!

reviews.name: Susan M.
reviews.text: I had some damaged siding after a bad storm. San Francisco Roofing Service was quick to respond and repair the damage. The repair was seamless and the price was fair.

reviews.name: Michael B.
reviews.text: Great experience with San Francisco Roofing Service. They were professional, on time, and the quality of their work was outstanding. My new vinyl siding looks fantastic!

service-areas.title: San Francisco Siding Service Areas
service-areas.description: San Francisco Roofing Service provides siding services throughout the Bay Area. Find your city!

serviceAreas.content:
San Francisco Roofing Service is proud to offer our top-quality siding services to the residents and businesses of San Francisco. As a locally owned and operated company, we understand the unique architectural styles and weather challenges that San Francisco homes face. We are committed to providing durable, beautiful, and energy-efficient siding solutions that will protect your property for years to come.

Our experienced team of siding installers is dedicated to delivering exceptional craftsmanship and customer service. Whether you're looking to upgrade your existing siding, repair damage, or install new siding on a construction project, we have the expertise to handle any job, big or small. We offer a wide range of siding materials, including vinyl, wood, fiber cement, and metal, to suit your aesthetic preferences and budget.

We are familiar with the building codes and regulations specific to San Francisco, ensuring that all our siding installations are compliant and meet the highest standards of quality. We take pride in our reputation for reliability, professionalism, and customer satisfaction. Contact us today for a free consultation and let us help you enhance the beauty and value of your San Francisco property.
serviceAreas.localContext: San Francisco is known for its iconic landmarks, diverse neighborhoods, and vibrant culture. The city experiences a unique microclimate, with cool summers and mild winters, making it essential to choose siding materials that can withstand the coastal weather conditions.
